title: Deadpool
reviews: Brilliant superhero comedy breaks every rule
Reynolds absolutely perfect for this role
Refreshingly self aware meta comic brilliance
Hilariously crude yet surprisingly heartfelt story
Best R rated superhero film ever
Fourth wall breaking comedy gold mine
Wickedly funny adult oriented superhero romp
Perfectly balances humor with genuine emotion
Subversive take on tired superhero formula
Irreverent masterpiece of comedic comic adaptation
Smart writing elevates crude humor perfectly
Ryan Reynolds was born for this
Laugh out loud funny throughout entirety
Cleverly deconstructs superhero movie tired tropes
Surprisingly touching beneath all the profanity
Perfectly executed blend of comedy action
Refreshing antidote to generic superhero fatigue
Witty dialogue keeps you constantly entertained
Adult superhero comedy done absolutely right
Endlessly quotable and infinitely rewatchable gem
